title: missy's paintings
description: A collection of paintings I made over time :D
body:
**A painting mod using pixel art I've made over the years :D
Here's some of them, the rest are in the gallery tab!
A lot of them are based of the art of Mavis Hall
**
![Confidence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/155c5a3ce8535d501b424a4a43d027640469187d.png)
![Hypnos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a84489bc8a9ab3a3a0cd1c23c4bcbd63e2084e1e.png)
![Marcy Wu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ab5d069f8f411eb73538eb4df19c39370b3a3c8.png)

If you have art you would like me to make pixel art of (Ill think about it) OR you just want to say something to me, message me >:3 mise_png on discord
